creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
/usr/local/share/dtrace-toolkit/Man/Readme

Extract: 

>    2. If the DTraceToolkit has been installed, and that dir to your MANPATH,
> 
>         MANPATH=$MANPATH:/opt/DTT/Man

– that's not the path used by the port to FreeBSD. 

As far as I can tell, the proper path is: 

/usr/local/share/dtrace-toolkit/Man
